cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about Accelerator?
cards.back: Thread block: a collection of threads that access the same shared memory.

cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about A100?
cards.back: Consequently, a thread block is scheduled on one SM.

cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about H100?
cards.back: In Triton, think natively in terms of thread blocks (later).

cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about B200?
cards.back: cutlass: NVIDIA's CUDA library for linear algebra - sm100: corresponds to the NVIDIA Blackwell architecture (B200) - f32: float32 - 64x64x16: tile shape (more on this later) Benchmark and profile your code!
cards.sectionTitle: Interaction between programming model and hardware

cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about HBM?
cards.back: Reading/writing from HBM is slow, so use shared memory (local to SM).
cards.sectionTitle: Interaction between programming model and hardware

cards.front: What does this lecture emphasize about bandwidth?
cards.back: In practice, performance is very sensitive to the hardware, so need to understand it to obtain high performance.
cards.sectionTitle: Interaction between programming model and hardware
